meta.title: About Us
meta.description: Civic Awareness is an educational platform dedicated to helping people understand civic responsibilities, environmental care, public safety, and positive community values through simple, reliable, and easy-to-understand content.

cards.title: Our Mission
cards.text: Our mission is to promote responsible citizenship by sharing practical knowledge and everyday habits that help build cleaner, safer, and more respectful communities.

cards.title: What We Share
cards.text: We publish educational content on civic responsibilities, public cleanliness, environmental awareness, road safety, community participation, and other topics that encourage responsible living.

cards.title: Our Commitment
cards.text: We aim to provide accurate, informative, and easy-to-read content for educational purposes. Our goal is to help readers make informed decisions and contribute positively to society.

cards.title: Why Civic Awareness Matters
cards.text: Positive communities are built through everyday actions. By encouraging awareness and responsible behavior, we hope to inspire individuals to create a cleaner, healthier, and more respectful environment for everyone.
